page_content:
Formerly: BUDT758E.

BUDT722 Managing Digital Business Markets (2 Credits)

The objective is to understand the strategic and tactical issues

involved in managing digital businesses and markets. Also, some of the characteristics of digital businesses and markets that make them unique and understand how companies can best manage them will be examined. Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith.

Credit Only Granted for. BUDT758G or BUDT722.
